title: Intensely Buttery British Tomato Cottage Pie
description: A rich and savory English dish featuring a buttery tomato sauce topped with a crispy mashed potato crust, perfect for a comforting meal. This flexitarian-friendly recipe is made in one pot and dehydrates the tomatoes for intense flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pot, melt 1/2 cup of butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the dried tomatoes, flour, and vegetable broth, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
While the tomato sauce is simmering, prepare the mashed potato topping by mixing the mashed potatoes with the remaining 1/2 cup of butter and grated cheddar cheese.
Transfer the tomato sauce to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with the mashed potato mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown and the filling is hot and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
